overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, exploring a sunlit urban residential district with palm-lined streets. The player approaches and inspects a modified red vehicle in an open lot, then proceeds along the sidewalk toward towering futuristic megabuildings dominating the distant skyline.

agents.ego_description: walking through an open asphalt lot toward a red modified car parked near a blue shipping container

entered.detail: large blue metal shipping container with ventilation unit attached
large yellow patio umbrella shading a small vendor setup
single-story beige industrial building with roll-up garage doors
heavily modified red sedan with off-road tires, roof rack, and graffiti decals
towering futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit open lot with asphalt ground. A blue shipping container and yellow market umbrella sit near a beige garage building. The player approaches a red modified car parked in the center, while futuristic megabuildings loom in the distant background under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle inspection area transitioning to street approach

events.description: begins circling around the red modified car to inspect it from multiple angles
finishes inspecting vehicle and walks toward the sidewalk and street

agents.ego_description: circling around the red car to examine its details, then moving toward the street exit of the lot

entered.detail: paved pedestrian walkway with red-painted curbs

segments.scene_description: The player circles the red modified car, revealing its detailed customization including hood-mounted equipment and rear decals. After inspection, the player moves toward the street, leaving the shipping container and umbrella behind while approaching the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with palm tree lining

events.description: steps onto the sidewalk from the parking lot and encounters pedestrians
vehicles pass by on the street alongside the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing the street traffic

notable_agents.action: two children walking on the sidewalk toward the camera
muscular man in tank top walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: two-story teal wooden house with solar panels on the roof and weathered paint
tall palm trees lining the street with dry fronds

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing two children and a muscular man walking in the opposite direction. A teal residential house with solar panels stands prominently on the right, while vehicles occasionally pass on the adjacent street.

events.description: approaching intersection where towering futuristic megabuildings dominate the view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward a major intersection with increasing pedestrian activity

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in same direction along the sidewalk edge

entered.detail: single-story yellow commercial building with red trim and signage
massive twin cylindrical skyscrapers with Arasaka branding and external structural elements

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a major intersection where the massive cylindrical megabuildings tower overhead, dominating the skyline. A yellow commercial building occupies the corner lot, and more pedestrians appear as the area becomes more commercial. The palm trees continue lining the street as the futuristic city center grows imminent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet, sunlit parking lot into the towering scale of a futuristic urban center. It begins in an open asphalt lot, moving past a blue shipping container and a yellow umbrella to closely inspect a modified red car parked before a beige garage. As the camera leaves the vehicle behind, the scene shifts toward a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing pedestrians and a teal residential house equipped with solar panels. The perspective then advances toward a major intersection, where the residential atmosphere gives way to commercial yellow buildings and increased foot traffic. Finally, the view opens up to reveal massive cylindrical megabuildings that loom overhead, dominating the skyline as the camera enters the heart of the city.
